title: Optimization:
content:
Optimization:
• Use Addressables to lazy-load era assets, reducing initial app size.
• Implement a CDN (e.g., Cloudflare) for fast asset delivery.
• Validate community themes with automated CI checks (GitHub Actions) for compatibility.
Challenges to Mitigate:
• Ensure community themes meet performance and security standards.
• Optimize backend queries to handle high concurrent users.
7. Mythic & Philosophical Integration
Approach:
• Meta-Narrative: Weave the “Great Game” story into onboarding and tutorials, with the Archivist as a 3D narrator. Use lore.md files for era-specific stories.
• Cosmic Symbols: Visualize dice, checkers, and points with subtle animations (e.g., glowing dice for chance). Tie to philosophical quotes in tutorials.
• Archetypes: Unlock archetypes (e.g., Strategist) via achievements, influencing AI tone (e.g., analytical vs. playful).
• Interludes: Display quotes as 3D text overlays after significant moves, with a toggle to disable for casual players.
Optimization:
• Preload quote assets to avoid runtime delays.
